title: Review emulator GPU and CUDA host context

preflight.note: Created before this read-only GPU/CUDA evidence pass was implemented.

acceptance_criteria.text: The ForgeWire CUDA environment is located or reported missing, and the result is recorded with its relevance to the emulator blocker.
A read-only GPU/CUDA context capture script records Windows, GPU, NVIDIA, CUDA, Android Emulator, AVD text config, and PyTorch/CUDA evidence without mutating drivers or system settings.
The ROM lab documents a Windows graphics strategy covering the Quadro driver path, CUDA venv evidence, Intel/software renderer options, and better-host fallback.
The emulator smoke-test and ROM lab status reports are updated with CUDA/M1200 investigation results and driver-update caution.
Repository validation and ROM lab tests pass after the records are added.
No driver mutation, ForgeWire mutation, physical phone mutation, large binaries, firmware/images/blobs, serials, IMEIs, unlock keys, SDK files, AVD disk images, or crash databases are committed.
